name: Lisa and Karens Peach Crepes
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon oil or butter for frying
recipeInstructions: For crepes: Combine ingredients in blender or food processor and blend for 1 minute. Refrigerate for 1 hour. Using a crepe pan, coat lightly with butter or oil and turn crepes once, cooking until edges just brown. Finish the remaining crepes, and set aside. For filling: Combine cream cheese, vanilla, and sugar and blend until creamy. Assemble: Spread 2 tablespoons of the cheese mixture down the center of each crepe. Place fruit slices on the cheese. Dot with butter and sprinkle with brown sugar. Fold and place in a 9x13-inch oblong baking dish, seam side down. Bake at 325°F for 10-15 minutes until heated through. Arrange on serving plates. For whipped topping: Combine sugar and cream and beat on high until soft peaks form. Serve over warm crepes.
